==== /.src/missingEffectContext_pipe.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import { pipe } from "effect/Function"
    
    class ServiceA extends Effect.Service<ServiceA>()("ServiceA", {
      succeed: { a: 1 }
    }) {}
    
    // @ts-expect-error
    pipe(ServiceA, Effect.flatMap(() => Effect.void), Effect.runPromise)
                                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377004: Missing context ServiceA in the expected Effect type. effect(missingEffectContext)
